title: Dauntless (Pellaeon-class)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1|title2=''Pellaeon''-class}} {{Otheruses|Dauntless}} {{IndividualShip |image=[[File:Pellaeon-class.jpg]] |name=''Dauntless'' |designer= |manufacturer=[[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] |line= |model=[[Pellaeon-class Star Destroyer|''Pellaeon''-class Star Destroyer]] |type= |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role= |commission= |destroyed=137 ABY, [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]] |retired= |battles=[[Operation: Thunderstroke]] |affiliation=*[[Fel Empire]] *[[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]] *[[Empire-in-exile]] |navy= |fleet= |owners= |captains=*[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dorn (captain)|Dorn]] *[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Tohri Challon]] *[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Basile]] |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|How will I gain access to Bastion?''"
"''With this ship as bait|[[Darth Kruhl]] and [[Darth Maladi]]|[[Legacy (2006) 13|''Legacy'' (2006) 13]]}} The '''''Dauntless''''' was a [[Pellaeon-class Star Destroyer|''Pellaeon''-class Star Destroyer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] of the [[Fel Empire]]; though following the coup orchestrated by the [[One Sith]] it became part of the [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Sith Empire's]] fleet. ==History== [[File:Dauntless_destroyed.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The ''Dauntless'' is destroyed with all hands lost.]] {{Quote|This is Admiral Tohri Challon, in command of His Imperial Majesty's Star Destroyer Dauntless.|Admiral Tohri Challon|[[Legacy (2006) 45|''Legacy'' (2006) 45]]}} In [[137 ABY]], [[Darth Maladi]] had [[Darth Kruhl]] attempt to infiltrate [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]] and [[Duel on Bastion|assassinate]] [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Roan Fel]] using the defection of the ''Dauntless'' and [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Vikar Dorn]], whose [[Dorn (captain)|son]] was the vessel's [[Captain/Legends|captain]], as bait. When Lord Kruhl [[Death/Legends|failed]], Roan Fel's forces mustered and [[Dauntless crew killing|executed]] the entire crew, sparing only Governor Dorn, who was returned to Sith-controlled space as a messenger. Afterwards, the ''Dauntless'' became part of Fel's fleet and was used to transport the Emperor to [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]] to meet with the [[New Jedi Order]]. By this time, the vessel was under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Tohri Challon]], with [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Basile]] as her second in command. When the [[First Sith Imperial Strikeforce]] [[Operation: Thunderstroke|ambushed]] Fel and the meeting, the ''Dauntless'' engaged the three enemy Star Destroyers to allow the Emperor to be evacuated in his [[Defender One|shuttle]]. Although it was successful in covering the shuttle long enough for it to make a [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] jump, the ''Dauntless'' was destroyed soon after by the ''[[War Hammer]]''. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of the Dauntless (Pellaeon-class)}} *[[Legacy (2006) 13|''Legacy'' (2006) 13]] {{1st}} *[[Legacy (2006) 44|''Legacy'' (2006) 44]] *[[Legacy (2006) 45|''Legacy'' (2006) 45]] *[[Legacy (2006) 46|''Legacy'' (2006) 46]] ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Dauntless (Pellaeon-Klasse) |es=Intrépido (clase Pellaeon) |pl=Dauntless (typu Pellaeon) }} [[Category:Pellaeon-class Star Destroyers]] [[Category:Starships of Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Starships of the Empire-in-exile]] [[Category:Starships of the Fel Empire]]
